dir.code: loai_duyet, ma_kieu, dvcs, ma_bp, ma_md, nh_kh1, nh_kh2, nh_kh3, ma_nt, tien_tu
dir.order: loai_duyet, ma_kieu, dvcs, ma_bp, ma_md, nh_kh1, nh_kh2, nh_kh3, ma_nt, tien_tu

footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$overlapped nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin chi tiết mã kiểu %s1 đã cập nhật trong khai báo.' else N'The record consisting of approval category detail %s1 is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin chi tiết mã kiểu %s1 đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The record consisting of approval category detail %s1 has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$overlapped = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Phạm vi khai báo giá trị không được giao hoặc trùng nhau.' else N'The amount range must not be overlapped or duplicated.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where &k1;) begin select '' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_kieu)) as message, 'setObjectFocus(this);' as script return end
if exists(select 1 from @@table with(nolock) where &k3;) begin select 'tien_tu' as field, @$overlapped as message return end
select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where &k2;) begin select '' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_kieu)) as message, 'setObjectFocus(this);' as script return end
if not (&k0;) begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where not (&k2;) and (&k1;)) begin select '' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_kieu)) as message, 'setObjectFocus(this);' as script return end end
if exists(select 1 from @@table with(nolock) where &k3; and not (&k2;)) begin select 'tien_tu' as field, @$overlapped as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where &k1;
